case_title: LIPING YU VS. ZI CHENG CHEN

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LIPING YU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZI CHENG CHEN IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES WERE ASSISTED BY CANTONESE CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDEND EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED JAN-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZI CHENG
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZI CHENG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, LIPING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, ZI CHENG $985.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $985.00 FILED BY YU, LIPING AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZI CHENG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
